title: Add vibe status, doctor and adopt MVP
goal: Implement the first non-destructive Vibe lane lifecycle slice in wgx: status, doctor and adopt for existing branch/worktree reality.

acceptance.assertion: `wgx vibe status` lists existing Vibe receipts or reports that none exist without mutating Git.
`wgx vibe doctor` reports receipt/worktree/branch inconsistencies without cleanup.
`wgx vibe adopt` can create a receipt for an existing repo branch/worktree without changing branch contents.
Focused bats tests cover help, missing idea, status, doctor and adopt behavior.
